feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 71,907Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 117

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father. This will go through the entire bat family until we catch 'em all

entry.title: From sunset to sunrise (I fall for you)
entry.summary:
Author: ForTheLoveOfLiving

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,116Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 41

Summary: A voice pulls Clark out of his sunset musings. “What are you doing?” Clark jolts slightly, surprised. Usually he can detect a nearby person with ease. He turns his head, his ears focusing in on the slow but steady pace of the person’s pulse. Bright blue meets dark blue, and Clark’s eyes widen. “You’re Bruce Wayne.”5+1 Corensupes and Battinson identity reveal edition! 5 times Clark/Superman and Bruce/Batman get physically intimate without realising each other’s identity +1 time it all clicks together. 1. Host (Clark and Bruce)2. Threat (Bruce and Superman)3. Saved (Batman and Clark)4. Kryptonite (Superman and Batman)5. Again (Clark and Bruce) +1 Reveal (Batman and Superman / Clark and Bruce)

entry.title: Always and Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Iriley

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,219Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 400

Summary: Now that Peter’s portal home is finished it’s Jason’s turn to explore a whole new universe. A sequel to Shutterbug; Jason meets Peter’s old friends and villains along with some new ones! Enjoy! (Not entirely canon compliment! It’s a combination!)(I DO NOT OWN ANY OF THE CHARACTERS! They belong to marvel and DC!! Besides the one OC that belongs to a friend!)

entry.title: And I'll Do It Over Again (Hopefully Better This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,485Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 470

Summary: If you told one Damian Wayne he’d find a small, pit-touched child shivering under an overpass in a pool of what appeared to be Lazarus water tainted only by rainwater and blood, he’d probably question your sanity. Of course, he’d keep what you’d said in mind, but ultimately regard the notion as the nonsensical babbling of an unstable fool. After all, people, especially children, don’t just bleed Pit waters. But that’s exactly what he’s looking at, isn’t it?

entry.summary:
Author: anon_MS

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,938Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 28

Summary: When Clark Kent accidentally reveals his identity as Superman to billionaire Bruce Wayne, it leads them to question the nature of their relationship and the differences between their respective lives... especially since Clark doesn't know that Bruce Wayne is his long-time Justice League co-member, Batman.

entry.title: From Smallville with Love
entry.summary:
Author: anxiousdepressedintrovert

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 128,368Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 529

Summary: When a spacecraft crashes on a quiet Kansas farm, Jor-El—refugee of a dead world—arrives with his infant son in tow. Taken in by the Kents, Jor-El must learn what it means to be human while raising a child destined for greatness. What will the people of Smallville have to say about the unusual throuple?

entry.title: Hostages and Headaches
entry.summary:
Author: moonsie58

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,227Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 62

Summary: "Hello?"“I have Bruce Wayne and Timothy Wayne held at gunpoint.”Jason huffs. “Well, that’s not very nice. You didn’t say hello.”The man looks down at the receiver, baffled for a second. “I said I have Bruce and Timothy Wayne held at gunpoint.”“Yeah, I heard you, which kidnapping is a big no-no, didn’t your daddy ever teach you that?”  Or the one where Bruce and Tim get held hostage, Jason gets a ransom call, The Kidnapper gets a headache, and Clark finds out about Batman's gang of teenagers and twenty-year-olds and gets a boyfriend along the way.

entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

entry.summary:
Author: maraudersmqry

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 193,324Chapters: 30/31Kudos: 4,657

entry.title: The Detective’s Greatest Blindspot
entry.summary:
Author: Tigerphoenix

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,492Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 37

Summary: While he just wants Superman to stay on his side of the bay, Bruce encounters reporter Clark Kent at a gala, who calls Bruce out on his "Brucie" act. What starts as a tense "what are you hiding?" case turns into a genuine connection, where Bruce is so convinced that Clark Kent and the alien savior of Metropolis could never be the same person, he misses Clark's biggest secret. Then disaster strikes. In a Superman fight, the Daily Planet is destroyed, and witnesses say Clark was inside. Clark is dead—Superman's negligence killed him—and it has turned the Bat into a hunter, looking for a way to make the god pay for killing the best man he had ever known.

entry.title: Hiccups, and other ways to say I love you.
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,645Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 63

Summary: Clark knew what hiccups were. He understood how they worked, he could even see how the diaphragm reacted with his x-ray vision. It was nothing abnormal or strange. But when Batman got hiccups on a mission, Clark was stunned. - When Bruce was around someone he was into, he’d start hiccuping. It was deeply inconvenient. There hadn’t been any harm at least, that was until he started hiccuping relentlessly around Clark ‘Kal-el’ ‘Superman’ ‘Most beloved and lusted for man in Metropolis’ Kent. (Or; Bruce's body betrays him by hiccuping around his crush, and Clark loves humans.)

entry.title: A Bulletproof Plan
entry.summary:
Author: turqu0ise

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,977Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 45

Summary: But the feelings just won’t fade. At first, Bruce assumed it was just pure physical attraction that would wear off. Then a weak coworker crush that would disappear once he got to know the man behind Superman. But it didn’t—wouldn’t—disappear. If anything, the feelings only got stronger as time stretched on; five years of knowing Superman, three in which he also knew Clark Kent, and with every one, he only grew more infatuated with the man. Which is not going to work. He’s already noticed little things; assigning himself with Superman when their specific skills would work better separately, risking mission objectives when Superman is in danger, scheduling “interviews” with Clark Kent at a quantity that must be suspicious to anyone paying attention… This crush is more harm than it’s worth, and Bruce needs to get rid of it. So he makes a list.-OR: Clark will never love Bruce back, and Bruce is determined to prove that to himself as many times as necessary in order to get over his ridiculous crush. So he comes up with a list of surefire ways to make anyone fall for him, and when it doesn’t work on Clark, then he’ll be able to put it all behind him. Because Clark would never fall for him. Right?

entry.title: Seven minutes in heaven
entry.summary:
Author: SubtleSolstice

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 253,167Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 831

Summary: Dick Grayson thought it would be harmless, one chill night where the Young Justice crew and the Titans could actually relax together. No missions. No explosions. Just friends, laughter… and maybe a little too much alcohol. But when a round of Never Have I Ever spirals into Seven Minutes in Heaven, Dick and Wally find themselves a little too close in the dark — and suddenly, nothing feels simple anymore. Or;Wally and Dick’s developing relationship, full of tension, tenderness, and the two of them absolutely failing to keep their hands to themselves.

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,711Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 53

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore. i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: Brucie Cosmetics
entry.summary:
Author: asadsadlittleman

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,419Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 53

Summary: Bruce decides to start a super inclusive and accessible makeup brand, Brucie Cosmetics. Inspired by this Tumblr post: https://www.tumblr.com/superbat-lmao/785977043663962112/brucie-wayne-comes-out-with-his-own-cosmetic-line

entry.title: Being part of the Kent-Wayne family isn’t so bad
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,827Chapters: 8/39Kudos: 115

Summary: It’s been three years since Dick and Kori got married, and many things have changed for the Kent-Wayne family. The family grew larger through more adoptions and also biological ties. New soulmates were discovered, more weddings were held, the Justice League can finally put a name to the man behind the cowl, and Wayne Manor will never look the same again. But the greatest change? Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent are officially engaged. This is the story of how they got there. As for Conner? He couldn’t be doing any better!
